name: @ringtail/ui
description: Ringtail "Night Shift" design system — tokens, Rocco, spring motion, and on-brand React components (self-contained: react-only, PNG assets inlined).
//: DEV exports point at raw src so the monorepo (Storybook, Vite, tsconfig paths) consumes source directly. On `npm publish`, publishConfig.exports OVERRIDES `.` to the built ./dist so an EXTERNAL repo (ringtail-site/apps/app) gets compiled ESM + .d.ts with the PNGs inlined. See DISTRIBUTION.md.
